zh.lifeSummary: 當Pierre de Preuilly II於1124年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安時，他的父親Pierre Preuilly28歲，母親Dame Euphrosyne de Vendome24歲。他和Aenor Mauléon至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1204年在法國崔英德-吉洛易普易利-素-可萊享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pierre de Preuilly II于1124年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯維安时，他的父亲Pierre Preuilly28岁，母亲Dame Euphrosyne de Vendome24岁。他和Aenor Mauléon至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1204年在法国崔英德-吉洛易普易利-素-可萊享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Pierre de Preuilly II was born in 1124, in Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, his father, Pierre Preuilly, was 28 and his mother, Dame Euphrosyne de Vendome, was 24. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Aenor Mauléon. He died in 1204, in Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pierre de Preuilly II est né en 1124, à Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Pierre Preuilly, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Dame Euphrosyne de Vendome, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Aenor Mauléon. Il est décédé en 1204, à Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pierre de Preuilly II 1124 in Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pierre Preuilly 28 und seine Mutter Dame Euphrosyne de Vendome 24. Er hatte mit Aenor Mauléon mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1204 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre de Preuilly II è nato il nel 1124 nel Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, il suo padre, Pierre Preuilly, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Dame Euphrosyne de Vendome, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Aenor Mauléon. Morì nel 1204, nel Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pierre de Preuilly IIが1124年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンで生まれた時，父Pierre Preuillyは28歳，母Dame Euphrosyne de Vendomeは24歳であった。彼はAenor Mauléonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1204年にフランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアープレウイリ-スル-クレイゼで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pierre de Preuilly II(이)가 1124년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pierre Preuilly(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Euphrosyne de Vendome(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Aenor Mauléon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 플레우이리-수-클레이스에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre de Preuilly II nasceu em 1124, em Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Pierre Preuilly, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Dame Euphrosyne de Vendome, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Aenor Mauléon. Ele faleceu em 1204, em Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pierre de Preuilly II родился в 1124 г. в местности виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Pierre Preuilly было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Euphrosyne de Vendome, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Aenor Mauléon. Он умер в 1204 г. в местности преуилли-сур-клеис, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pierre de Preuilly II nació en 1124, en Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Pierre Preuilly, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Dame Euphrosyne de Vendome, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Aenor Mauléon. Murió en 1204, en Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 80 años.
